/CAL:SENTENCING/X:IT IS STIPULATED THAT THE PREVIOUS PRESENTENCE REPORT INCASE # 2296131 WILL BE INCORPORATED IN THIS CASE #2372974/X:THERE IS AN EARLY ADMISSION,/AJW/CH1:SP16M:L/CTSP:250/STATES/DNA/X:COURT ORDERED AND THE DEFENDANT AGREED THAT RESTITUTION OWED IN COURT# 2296131 TO VICTIMS ALEKBUTLER AND VICTORIA KRAMMEN ARE TRANSFERRED TO COURT# 2372974/X:DEFENDA TO PAY RESTITUTION IN COURT # 2372974,/X:COURT TO RETAINS JURISDICTION AS TO THE RESTITUTION AND INDICATES THE AMOUNT AS ZERO,/X:AMOUNT OF RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY PAROLE BOARD/X:SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 2 IS 16 MONTHS STATE PRISON/654:2/X:SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 3 IS 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL WITH 250DAYS CTS PLUS 124 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 374 DAYS CTS/TWS/CH3:CJ1Y/CTS:250//CCC:SENTENCE ON COUNT 1 AND 3/X:ONE YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE AS TO COUNT3 IS TO RUN CONCURRENT TO THE STATE PRISON SENTENCE ON COUNT 1,/X:SENTENCEAS TO THE ADMITTED ALLEGATION VC 23578 IS STAYED PER PC 654/SECFEE/ICNA/VF5:200/PAR/CDC/

/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1,2&3/X:  DEFENDANT ADMITS THE ALLEGATION(S) PURSUANT TO VC 23578 AS TRUE,/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:02-24-09/CONT'D SENTENCING/1203C:02-24-09/REPREQ:G:DATE:SN/X:PRESENTENCE REPORT IN SCN#201467 WILL BE INCLUDED INTHE STATE PRISON PACKET,/X:PAY RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM,/DOP/NB/TN:ALANJOSEPH MCCAHILL/VD:02-13-09 TRIAL DATE/
